ops.text: Deployment of Small Families (2-6) Bulk Pipeline

ops.find_block:
const { data: statsData } = await supabase.rpc('get_stats_lw');
    const grandTotal = Array.isArray(statsData) ? statsData[0].total_count : 47649;
ops.replace_with:
const { data: statsData } = await supabase.rpc('get_stats_sf');
    const grandTotal = Array.isArray(statsData) ? statsData[0].total_count : 47995;

ops.find_block: const { data: checkpoint } = await supabase.from('export_checkpoint_lw').select('last_offset').eq('id', 1).single();
ops.replace_with: const { data: checkpoint } = await supabase.from('export_checkpoint_sf').select('last_offset').eq('id', 1).single();

ops.find_block: const { data: chunk, error: fetchErr } = await supabase.rpc('get_lone_wolf_words', {
ops.replace_with: const { data: chunk, error: fetchErr } = await supabase.rpc('get_words_sf', {

ops.find_block: const FOLDER = "lone_wolves";
ops.replace_with: const FOLDER = "small_families";

ops.find_block: await supabase.from('export_checkpoint_lw').update({ last_offset: nextOffset }).eq('id', 1);
ops.replace_with: await supabase.from('export_checkpoint_sf').update({ last_offset: nextOffset }).eq('id', 1);

ops.find_block: const { count: totalCount, error: countErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_lw').select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });
ops.replace_with: const { count: totalCount, error: countErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_sf').select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true });

ops.find_block: const { data: files, error: listErr } = await supabase.storage.from('inspection_bucket').list('lone_wolves', { limit: 1000 });
ops.replace_with: const { data: files, error: listErr } = await supabase.storage.from('inspection_bucket').list('small_families', { limit: 1000 });

ops.find_block: const { error: upsertErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_lw').upsert(filePaths, { onConflict: 'file_path', ignoreDuplicates: true });
ops.replace_with: const { error: upsertErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_sf').upsert(filePaths, { onConflict: 'file_path', ignoreDuplicates: true });

ops.find_block: file_path: 'lone_wolves/' + f.name,
ops.replace_with: file_path: 'small_families/' + f.name,

ops.find_block: const { data: rpcData, error: rpcErr } = await supabase.rpc('claim_batch_lw', { worker_id_param: worker_id });
ops.replace_with: const { data: rpcData, error: rpcErr } = await supabase.rpc('claim_batch_sf', { worker_id_param: worker_id });

ops.find_block: const { error: updateErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_lw')
ops.replace_with: const { error: updateErr } = await supabase.from('validation_tracking_sf')

ops.find_block: const { error: insErr } = await supabase.from('candidate_words_lw').insert(finalWords);
ops.replace_with: const { error: insErr } = await supabase.from('candidate_words_sf').insert(finalWords);

ops.text: Convert static CI/CD dates to relative time (Triggered vs Started)

ops.find_block: ${new Date(run.created_at).toLocaleDateString()} ${new Date(run.created_at).toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'})}
